narrative: I'm currently healthy overall, but two memory subsystems are malfunctioning: ChromaDB is throwing type errors and Neo4j isn't properly installed. My introspection capability is also incomplete without version control for its prompt. With 13 agents running and nearly 90 minutes of uptime, these memory issues could compound if left unresolved, though they're not immediately critical. I should prioritize fixing the Neo4j dependency first since the missing module completely blocks that functionality.
